title: Default Crystal PVP
description: This Default CPvP modpack includes popular and lesser-known optimization and PvP mods for smooth gameplay. Track HP, armor, and effects, enjoy CrystalPvP improvements.
body:
Default PvP Modpack

A well-optimized client-side modpack featuring a wide selection of both popular and lesser-known PvP mods for smooth and competitive gameplay.

Features:

- Strong performance optimization for stable and smooth gameplay
- HUD mods displaying HP, armor durability, and active effects
- Crystal PvP support with dedicated mods
- Smooth zoom, blur effects, and mod menu included
- Easily expandable via the Modrinth App — add any additional client mods with no hassle

Designed as a solid base for PvP players of any playstyle. Full mod list available on the modpack page.


Want a custom modpack built for your needs? Check out my Fiverr gig: https://www.fiverr.com/s/Ay5jzlq
